statement: In every magma, Equation 721 (`x = y * (y * ((y * z) * z))`) implies Equation 796 (`x = y * (z * ((w * y) * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0428
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op y (op (op y z) z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op w y) x)))
